key.name: update-time
key.description: Seconds between fallback battery polls. Primary updates come from D-Bus signals.

key.name: show-panel-percentage
key.description: Display the current battery percentage next to the icon in the top bar.

key.name: enable-low-battery-alarm
key.description: Show notifications when battery drops below the low battery threshold.

key.name: low-battery-threshold
key.description: Battery percentage at which low battery alerts begin.

key.name: critical-battery-threshold
key.description: Battery percentage at which the persistent critical alert appears.

key.name: low-battery-alert-interval
key.description: Alert the user for every N% decrease in battery below the threshold.

key.name: enable-charge-limit-alarm
key.description: Alert when battery reaches the configured charge limit while charging.

key.name: charge-limit
key.description: Battery charge level at which to alert the user to unplug.

key.name: enable-charge-prediction
key.description: Show estimated time when the battery will be fully charged.
